steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The decisive clue is the phrase “the student wants to specify the order in which different government entities were given the authority.” To accomplish this, the answer must lay out the chronological progression of transfers.

steps.title: Apply the criterion to the choices
steps.content: D shows the complete chronological sequence: Commerce Department to CAA in 1938, then CAA to FAA in 1958. The other three either omit the specific dates and sequence, reverse the transfer direction, or only partially address the timeline. That matches choice D — D is correct.
